    0% {
        transform: rotate(0deg);
    }
    100% {
        transform: rotate(360deg);
    }
}
(function ($) {
	"use strict";

/*=============================================
	=         Road Map           =
=============================================*/
$('.bt-roadmap_x').mCustomScrollbar({
	axis: "x",
	scrollbarPosition: "outside",
	theme: "custom-bar3",
	scrollInertia: 100,
	advanced: {
		autoExpandHorizontalScroll: 2
	}
});


})(jQuery);
